stories.title: The Open Championship 2026: Herbert, Burns tie rec...
stories.summary: Here are some of the top sights, sounds and highlights from the second round of the 2026 Open Championship at Royal Birkdale Golf Club.

stories.title: Sources: No weather concern for World Cup final
stories.summary: The World Cup final is not under any threat despite the air quality warnings in the area, sources told ESPN.

stories.title: Herbert matches major record with 62 at Open
stories.summary: Lucas Herbert and Sam Burns each matched the major championship scoring record of 62 on Friday in the 154th Open Championship at Royal Birkdale Golf Club.

stories.title: Silver: Unfair to turn Clark into 'political footb...
stories.summary: NBA commissioner Adam Silver said Fever star Caitlin Clark has become a "political football" amid debates about officiating and physical play in the WNBA.

stories.title: World Cup winners to claim 'championship rings'
stories.summary: The winners of the World Cup will be awarded championship rings in addition to the traditional trophy and gold medals.
